header.subtitle: Track course availability in real time

filter.label: Filter results by status
filter.emptyOpen: No open courses in these results
filter.emptyFull: No full courses in these results
filter.emptyHint: Switch the filter above to see the rest of the results.

watchlist.alertsOnTitle: Alerts on — you'll be notified when a seat opens
watchlist.alertsOffTitle: Alerts off — turn on to be notified when a seat opens

placeholder.searchTitle: Search for a course to get started
placeholder.searchHint: Fill in a course number, name, or teacher above, then hit Search. Click ★ on any result to add it to your watchlist.
placeholder.noMatchHint: Try a different course number, name, or teacher.
placeholder.emptyWatchlistHint: Search for courses and click ★ to track them here.

errors.noSearchField: Enter at least one search field — course no., name, or teacher.

login.title: NTUST Course Tracker
login.subtitle: Monitor course availability and save your watchlist across devices.
login.feature2: ★ Watchlist synced across all your devices
login.feature3: 🔔 Email & Discord alerts when slots open

welcome.step1Body: Go to the <1>Search</1> tab, pick your semester, then enter a course number, name, or teacher. Hit <3>Search</3> any time to get the latest enrollment numbers.
welcome.step2Body: Click <1>★</1> on any result to add it to your Watchlist. Then flip the <3>Alerts</3> switch on its card (or click the bell in search results) to turn on slot-opening alerts for it.
welcome.step3Body: Open the <1>Notifications</1> tab to connect email or a Discord webhook. The server monitors your courses 24/7 and sends an alert the moment a slot opens — even with your browser closed.

notify.title: Notification Preferences
notify.subtitlePanel: Choose how you want to be alerted when a watched course opens up. Flip the Alerts switch on any watched course to enable alerts for it.
notify.step1Label: Add a course to your Watchlist
notify.step1Hint: Search tab → click ★ on any course
notify.step2Hint: Toggle Email or Discord below, then Save
notify.step3Label: Turn on alerts for a watched course
notify.step3Hint: Watchlist tab → flip the Alerts switch on a course
notify.emailDesc: Send an email to your Google account address when a slot opens.
notify.discordDesc: Post a message to a Discord channel via webhook.
notify.discordUserIdHint: Enable Developer Mode in Discord → right-click your name → Copy User ID.
notify.helpSummary: How to get a Discord webhook URL
notify.helpStep1: Open Discord and go to the channel you want notifications in.
notify.helpStep2: Click the gear icon next to the channel name (<1>Edit Channel</1>).
notify.helpStep4: Give it a name, then click <1>Copy Webhook URL</1>.
notify.helpStep5: Paste the URL into the field above and save.
notify.selectChannel: Select at least one channel to receive alerts.
notify.invalidWebhook: Webhook URL must start with https://discord.com/api/webhooks/
notify.intervalHint: How often the server checks for open slots on your watched courses.
notify.ntustFetches_one: NTUST fetches: {{total}} total (shared across all watchers), {{failures}} consecutive failure
notify.ntustFetches_other: NTUST fetches: {{total}} total (shared across all watchers), {{failures}} consecutive failures
notify.drivenByFaster: — driven by a faster watcher; your alerts still arrive every {{seconds}}s
notify.noFetchData: No fetch data yet — poller hasn’t run for this course.
notify.testTitle: Send a test alert to verify your Discord / email channel
